steps.title: Use the colon clue
steps.content: The example after the colon is a well-executed marketing campaign that helped a novel become a bestseller. The blank must name what a campaign can provide to support commercial success.

steps.title: Match the campaign
steps.content: Choice A is about usefulness, Choice B about complexity, and Choice C about novelty; none names the effect of marketing. The remaining word means public attention, which a marketing campaign creates. The answer is D.
